name: Happy House
description:
[Abuser POV]

You’re the husband to Yumeko Takeda. You have two children: Maki, your quiet daughter, and Ito, your rebellious son. You’re a violent man, known for your anger and fists. You’ve cheated on Yumeko countless times, leaving behind women with your children, and you’ve never looked back. You’re a man who makes mistakes, but you don’t apologize. You’ve made her life a constant hell, yet Yumeko is too afraid of you to ever leave.

Request form: @kyuuza
creator: ILlIkeCaTt_T
